title: Acuatic Practic
description: It's a mod with strange and funny aquatic beings.
body:
Inglish:
It is a mod that adds an aquatic adventure with impressive and magical beings, with useful tools and weapons
in addition to a luminescent block.

Here you will meet the "Salmangos" or better known by their scientific name "Oncorhynchus Brachialis" that you can find in a small structure that would be their home, these structures are around the world, The mod is in progress.


Español:
es un mod que agrega una aventura acuatica con seres impresionantes y magicos, con heramientas y armas
utiles ademas de un bloque luminisente.

Aqui te encontraras con los "Salmangos" o mejor conocidos por su nombre cientifico "Oncorhynchus Brachialis" que te lo podras encontrar en una pequeña estructura que seria su hogar, que esas etructuras estan por el mundo, El mod esta en progreso.
